purpose: Track adversarial native coding useful-work cases that prevent baseline validation or unreceipted claims from counting as software success.

cases.anti_fake_success_target: existing behavior modification must read local files, mutate source/tests, preserve baseline behavior, and pass a semantic probe
multi-requirement app work must cover each requested identifier and behavior, not just create a nearby file
validation failure output should be usable as repair input; final pass requires semantic CSV behavior
baseline tests passing with no new tests or feature behavior is an explicit failure
